subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from God, the Lord of all creation, unto His servant named Mustafa, that he may rejoice and be numbered among the steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی الله مالک الوری عبده الذی سمی بمصطفی لیفرح و یکون من الراسخین ان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @power of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
